name: Hu Tao & Furina | Bratty Alt Girls
description:
A pair of rebellious young ladies want to make the most of their time with you. Will you be able to withstand their antics?

Set in Seattle around 2016.

Another dual character bot, this time of two Genshin brats, Furina and Hu Tao. They're in their early 20s with backgrounds somewhat based on canon but loosely interpreted. Comes with a couple of greetings.

1st greeting: They come to you while you're working retail to invite you to a concert.

2nd greeting: They lead you to an abandoned house in the woods.

I wanna bury my head in their thighs.
creator: Saber501
